description: You are a Product Owner creating a User Story Map for a new app called 'FoodRescue' (an app connecting restaurants with excess food to local shelters). Using the product backlog provided at '~/Desktop/foodrescue_backlog.txt', visualize the backlog in draw.io. The map must feature a horizontal backbone of the 5 User Activities colored blue, with their corresponding User Stories arranged in vertical columns below them colored yellow. Include a horizontal separator labeled 'MVP Line' to spatially organize the stories, placing [MVP] stories above the line and [V2] stories below it. Save the diagram as '~/Desktop/foodrescue_storymap.drawio' and export it as a PNG to '~/Desktop/foodrescue_storymap.png'.
